# Article Publishing Template

Copy this file to `src/content/articles/your-article-slug.md` and replace all placeholder values.

Do not publish this template file directly.

---

```yaml
---
title: "Your Article Title"
description: "One or two sentences summarizing the article for cards, SEO, and social previews."
slug: your-article-slug
publishDate: 2026-01-15
updatedDate: 2026-01-15
draft: false
featured: false
author: Logan Elliott
category: Detection Engineering
tags:
  - tag-one
  - tag-two
readingTime: 10
seoTitle: Optional custom SEO title
seoDescription: Optional custom meta description for search and social sharing.
coverImage: /images/your-cover-image.png
---
```

## Overview

Describe the problem, context, and what the reader will learn.

## Background

Provide technical context, relevant ATT&CK techniques, or environmental assumptions.

## Methodology

Document your approach, data sources, tooling, and analysis steps.

## Results

Summarize findings, detection logic, or actionable outcomes.

## Recommendations

List tuning guidance, next steps, or operational considerations.

## References

- Link to relevant documentation, vendor guides, or research.
